DataObjectString.Name: Title
DataObjectString.Value: Zork I: The Great Underground Empire

DataObjectString.Name: Description
DataObjectString.Value: The original text-based adventure game that started it all. Explore the Great Underground Empire, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden treasures in this classic adventure.

DataObjectString.Name: Description
DataObjectString.Value: A chilling journey into the mind of a disturbed protagonist. Navigate through a series of psychological challenges and uncover dark secrets in this horror adventure.
